pages.title: Magic Beauty Makeup
pages.description:
Apply detailed makeup looks by selecting colors and tools to craft magical transformations. Use layering and blending techniques to enhance facial features with creative freedom. Players aim to complete each style with precision, progressing through various design challenges that develop artistic skills in a relaxing, beauty-themed setting.

Key Features

• Layered makeup application system  
• Color palette and brush controls  
• Style completion challenges  
• Progressive look complexity  
• Enchanted beauty design elements

pages.title: ASMR Makeover & Makeup Studio
pages.description:
Apply precise ASMR-inspired makeup techniques using various brushes and product types to craft relaxing facial transformations. Players control layered cosmetic application involving blending, contouring, and nail art customization, progressing through client requests with time-based challenges. The calming studio setting emphasizes meticulous detail and sensory triggers to complete satisfying beauty makeovers.

Key Features

• Layered cosmetic application system  
• Brush stroke control mechanics  
• Time-limited client makeover challenges  
• Nail art and accessory customization  
• Soothing ASMR audio feedback

pages.title: Dazzling Divas Makeup
pages.description:
Apply makeup styles by selecting and blending vibrant cosmetics on detailed facial models, experimenting with colors and techniques to create standout diva looks. Progress through increasing makeup challenges that test precision and color coordination, with unlockable cosmetic palettes enhancing creativity. The game focuses on interactive makeup application mechanics set in a dynamic beauty studio environment.

Key Features

• Layered makeup application tools  
• Precision color blending controls

• Unlockable cosmetic palettes

The core mechanic revolves around spatial precision and timing across increasingly challenging stages designed for casual players. Gameplay advances as stacking speed and color variety intensify on vibrant backgrounds.

Key Features

• Drag-and-drop stacking system  
• Precision alignment controls
